violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Shelving units in the walk-in cooler were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items were found stored on the floor near the ice machine. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee beverages were found stored on tables in the front food preparation area. Personal items should be stored separated from food items used in the facility.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
